channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Stuff outside no10, 27th April
item.description:
Needs clearing looks like pumping or electrical stuff
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped van used for advertising with fake reg plates, 27th April
item.description:
This van may have fake number plates and has been dumped here for weeks for the propose of advertising. Apart from the number plates, parking for advertising is illegal under Town and Country Planning (Control of Advertisements) (England) Regulations 2007 — specifically the Class B exemption in Schedule 3.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tesco shopping trolly, 27th April
item.description:
It’s blocked the path and needs to be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Addison Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tesco shopping trolley, 27th April
item.description:
Blocking the payment
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bloomfield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped wardrobe, 27th April
item.description:
Dumped wardrobe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continued fly tipping, 27th April
item.description:
4 dining chairs added to the existing fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Children’s toys dumped, 27th April
item.description:
Children’s toys

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Broken pavement, 27th April
item.description:
Outside 86 Welling way. Damaged pavement broken and trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and then bag opened by fox, 27th April
item.description:
Massive amount of litter everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Screws in new seating area, 27th April
item.description:
I spotted last week and someone has rendered the new seats unusable with numerous screws. This could be dangerous at night or for partially sighted people

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin with rotten food and dog waste near school exit, 27th April
item.description:
Hello, this abandoned bin is outside the Hamlet Junior school exit, used by children and staff. Over the weeks that it has been there it has been filled up and is now over flowing with rotten food and dog waste causing a health hazard as flies and maggots set in. Opposite house 262 Turney Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turney Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish dumped at Blackheath Standard, 27th April
item.description:
These are photos of the domestic waste that have been placed by the bins outside the shops on Westcombe Hill. By tomorrow foxes will have spread the waste over the street. There are letters and other packaging that identify the shops and flats that the rubbish comes from.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Patch of damage on busy footpath, 27th April
item.description:
This looks like it could be damage caused by delivery lorries to the building under change/construction, next to New Community Church on pathway 159. This is a very busy footpath especially on a Sunday, when the church has three very busy services a day. Also, people using it as a cut through from Station Road. Maybe inspect? If it's being caused by the construction, maybe they should pay for repair? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, High Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TP sign sprated, 27th April
item.description:
The M1 parking zone sign between The Huntsman & Hounds Pub and 76 Elsted Street has been sprayed. Lamp post on Larissa Street - the pedestrianised alleyway between said two locations.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laressa Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste, 27th April
item.description:
Old wooden boards, a broken screen and bags of domestic waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 27th April
item.description:
Not sure if reported but when crossing the road where the lights are leaving station, it's very dangerous because of this pothole plus driving over it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste dumped by public bins. Spilling all over the street again., 27th April
item.description:
This is clearly a mixture of domestic and shop waste. There are discarded letters and other packaging clearly identifying some of the addresses responsible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post marathon rubbish not collected, 27th April
item.description:
Marathon rubbish has been collected into bags but then not taken away. The crows have broken the bags and now rubbish is scattered across a wide area. The centre is here but some has spread, or was also left behind, closer to the main road crossing (the A2 crossing to the Greenwich Park main gate).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large pile of black sacks and other litter, 27th April
item.description:
Around a tree ,west kerb Oxford Road at junction with Lincoln Road. Please clear as others are adding to the pile

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red graffiti on Cycle hanger, 27th April
item.description:
Red paint graffiti on the top of the cycle hanger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
